title: Issues With Uploading Hi-Res Imagery
excerpt: Is anybody else having an issue with uploading hi-res images? I keep uploading hi-res imagery and Monday will only display/upload a thumbnail, and won’t have the full size graphic in the pulse.

posts.author: jacksonmelissa1 (Melissa Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is anybody else having an issue with uploading hi-res images? I keep uploading hi-res imagery and Monday will only display/upload a thumbnail, and won’t have the full size graphic in the pulse.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Melissa

Can you send over an example in a screenshot?

Cheers!

posts.author: Amanda (Amanda Lawton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same here. My manager is uploading a 10Mb file and Monday.com reduces it to the thumbnail at a size of 166Kb when I download. As you can see she is quite annoyed and wants to ditch Monday.

Monday hi rez error1137×1583 274 KB
